product_results.title: GONEZ Magnetic for iPhone 16 Pro Case, Compatible with MagSafe, [Screen Protector + Camera Lens Protector], Silicone Shockproof Anti-Scratch Protective Phone Case 6.3 inch, Stone

summary.text: Customers find this cellular phone case to be of great quality and describe it as a good case. They appreciate the different color options and find the colors attractive. The texture receives positive feedback, with users noting it feels super soft and good to the touch. Customers also value the case's protection, ease of installation, and functionality. However, opinions are mixed regarding durability and grip performance.

authors_reviews.title: Smooth and lightweight case with protective accessories included
authors_reviews.text: Soft, smooth, lightweight case. Please to have protective accessories included for the reasonable price - easy to install screen and lens protector. Also includes QR code to scan to activate warranty. Only improvement would be to include instructions for installing protective for anyone not familiar with the multi-step process. Overall very happy.
authors_reviews.author: Mary Coulas

authors_reviews.title: good but...
authors_reviews.text: the positive: the case is very sturdy and I'm confident if it drops my phone is protected. i like the seamless camera touch sensor cover the Negatives: - it only contains one screen protector. Unfortunately i trapped a dust particle when placing the screen protector and im stuck with a dust particle in the middle - the case is very grippy and it comes out hardly from my pocket
authors_reviews.author: Amazon user
